scripts.docker:setup:dev: docker-compose build && docker-compose up -d && sleep 15 && docker exec restaurant-backend sh -c "cd /app/packages/db && pnpm exec prisma db push && /usr/local/bin/ts-node --transpile-only --compiler-options '{\"module\":\"CommonJS\"}' prisma/seed.ts"
scripts.docker:setup: docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml build && docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d && sleep 15 && docker exec restaurant-backend sh -c "cd /app/packages/db && pnpm exec prisma db push && /usr/local/bin/ts-node --transpile-only --compiler-options '{\"module\":\"CommonJS\"}' prisma/seed.ts"
scripts.docker:db:push: docker exec restaurant-backend sh -c "cd /app/packages/db && pnpm exec prisma db push"
scripts.docker:db:reset: docker exec restaurant-backend sh -c "cd /app/packages/db && pnpm exec prisma db push && /usr/local/bin/ts-node --transpile-only --compiler-options '{\"module\":\"CommonJS\"}' prisma/seed.ts"
scripts.docker:db:studio: docker exec -it restaurant-backend sh -c "cd /app/packages/db && pnpm exec prisma studio"
